lines.line: ហេតុអ្វីជីវិតនេះមិនដែលជួប សុខ
lines.translation: Why does this life never meet happiness
lines.phonetic: hetoavei chivit nih min del chuob sokh

lines.line: សត្រូវដែលពាំងពីមុខគឺជាសេចក្តីទុក្ខ
lines.translation: The enemy that lies ahead is misery
lines.phonetic: sa trauv del peang pimoukh kuchea sechaktei toukkh

words.word: សេចក្តីទុក្ខ

lines.line: រឿងជីវិតជាតិនេះចុកជាងឡានបុក
lines.translation: This story of national life hurts more than a car crash
lines.phonetic: rueng chivit cheate nih chok cheang lan bok

lines.line: ស្រែកជេរពិភពលោកម្តេចមិនអោយខ្ញុំស្រណុក
lines.translation: Swearing at the world, why not make me happy
lines.phonetic: srek cher piphoplok mte ch min aoy khnhom sranok

lines.line: ថ្ងៃមុនឬថ្ងៃនេះវាដូចជាថ្ងៃ ស្អែក
lines.translation: The day before or today is like tomorrow
lines.phonetic: thngaimoun ryy thngainih vea dauchchea thngai saek

lines.line: គ្មានអ្នកឭសម្រែកបេះដូងដែលខ្ញុំបានស្រែក
lines.translation: No one hears my heart screaming
lines.phonetic: kmean anak ly samrek behdaung del khnhom ban srek

lines.line: បិទភ្នែកធ្វើមិនដឹងខំប្រឹងប្រកែក
lines.translation: Close your eyes, do not know, try to argue
lines.phonetic: bet phnek thveumindoeng khambroeng brakek

words.word: ធ្វើមិនដឹង

lines.line: ចាត់ទុកខ្ញុំជាខ្មាំងក្នុងសំណាញ់ដែក
lines.translation: Consider me an enemy in the net
lines.phonetic: chattouk khnhom chea khmang knong saamnanh dek

lines.line: ក៏ដឹងប្រឹងហើយទៅមិនរួច
lines.translation: Also know how to work hard
lines.phonetic: ka doeng broeng haey tow min ruoch

lines.line: សម្ដីដែលយើងនិយាយគេចាត់ទុកដូចសម្លេងហួច
lines.translation: The words we speak are considered whistling.
lines.phonetic: samdi del yeung niyeay ke chattouk dauch samleng huoch

lines.line: ទឹកមាត់សាបហួស ហាមាត់គេចាប់ក្របួច
lines.translation: Saliva is too fresh, the mouth is cracked
lines.phonetic: tukmeatsab huosa  hamat ke chab krabuoch

lines.line: កែវភ្នែកសម្លឹងមកយើងធ្វើដូចឯងជាចោរលួច
lines.translation: Eyes looking at us acting like thieves
lines.phonetic: kevophnek samlung mk yeung thveu dauch eng chea chaorluoch

lines.line: ជាទាសករ កម្មករខ្ញុំកំដរយើងធ្វើល្អគេមើលមិនឃើញ
lines.translation: As slaves, workers, I accompany us, we do good, they are invisible
lines.phonetic: chea teasakr  kammokr khnhomkamdr yeung thveula ke meul minkheunh

lines.line: នៅតែបន្តស្មោះសជាចលករ
lines.translation: Remains loyal as a driving force
lines.phonetic: nowte bant smaoh sa chea chalokr

lines.line: នៅតែបន្តអាណាដែលជិះជាន់លើកដៃមួយពាន់ឱ្យក្ត
lines.translation: Continues Anna, who oppresses, raises a thousand hands to heat
lines.phonetic: nowte bant ana del chiahchean leukdai muoy pean aoy kt

lines.line: គិតច្រើនណាស់មិនដឹងថាគិតអីទេ
lines.translation: Think a lot, do not know what to think
lines.phonetic: kit chraennasa mindoeng tha kit ei te

lines.line: ពិភពលោកធំណាស់តែវាគ្មានកន្លែងទំនេរ
lines.translation: The world is big, but there is no space
lines.phonetic: piphoplok thom nasa te vea kmean kanleng tomner

lines.line: ជីវិតពិតលំបាកវាមិនស្រួលដូចគិតទេ
lines.translation: Real life is hard, it is not as easy as you think
lines.phonetic: chivit pit lombak vea min sruol dauch kit te

lines.line: រស់ត្រូវតែឆ្លាតបើមិនលឿននៅក្រោយគេ
lines.translation: Live must be smart if not fast behind
lines.phonetic: rsa trauvte chhlat bae min luen now kraoy ke

lines.line: មើលខ្លួនឯងសល់តែស្បែកនិងឆ្អឹង
lines.translation: Look at yourself, only skin and bones
lines.phonetic: meul khluoneng sal te sbek ning chhaoeng

lines.line: ភ្នែកមិញ៉ូបតែខំសម្លឹង
lines.phonetic: phnek mi nhau b tekham samlung

lines.line: មាឌតូចចិត្តធំត្រូវតែប្រឹង
lines.translation: Small and big must work hard
lines.phonetic: meadtauch chett thom trauvte broeng

lines.line: ស៊ូស្លាប់នឹងការងារមិនឲ្យស្លាប់លើអង្រឹង
lines.translation: Succeed at work not to die on a hammock
lines.phonetic: saousleab nung karngear min aoy slab leu angrung

lines.line: ជីវិតគឺអញ្ចឹងបែបនឹង
lines.phonetic: chivit ku anhchung beb nung

lines.line: ពេលដែលគេប្រើសូមកុំខឹង
lines.translation: When used, do not get angry
lines.phonetic: pel delke brae saumkom khoeng

lines.line: មកពីយើងភ្លើមិនទាន់ឆ្លាត
lines.translation: Because we are not smart yet
lines.phonetic: mk pi yeung phleu mintean chhlat

lines.line: ស្លៀកពាក់មិនទាន់ស្អាតបាត
lines.phonetic: sliekpeak mintean saatbat

lines.line: ហេតុអ្វីមិនខំប្រឹងសង្វាត
lines.phonetic: hetoavei min khambroeng sangveat

words.translation: ស ង្វា ត

lines.line: ខំដែរតែគេជាន់
lines.phonetic: kham der te ke chean

lines.line: ខួរក្បាលគេពង្វក់រូបភាពគេបំភាន់
lines.phonetic: khuorokbal ke pongvok roubpheap ke bamphean

lines.line: គេថាចូលចិត្តស្មើរភាព
lines.phonetic: ke tha chaulchett smae r pheap

lines.line: តែរកបានមួយម៉ឺនវាប្រាប់យើងថា 1000
lines.translation: But earn ten thousand, it tells us that 1000
lines.phonetic: te rk ban muoy meun vea brab yeung tha 1000

lines.line: លុយសប្រែជាលុយខ្មៅ
lines.translation: White money turns into black money
lines.phonetic: louy sa brecha louyokhmaw

lines.line: មិត្តភាពប្រែជាអ្នកក្រៅ
lines.phonetic: mitt pheap brecha anakakraw

lines.line: ដង្កូវក្លាយទៅជាមេអំបៅ
lines.phonetic: dangkouv klaytowchea meambaw

lines.line: យើងនៅតែក្រតែវាប្រែជាដង្ខៅ
lines.translation: We are still poor, but it turns into a worm
lines.phonetic: yeung nowte kr te vea brecha dangkhow

lines.line: អស់ទាំងមិត្តភាពអស់ទាំងស្នេហា
lines.phonetic: asa teang mitt pheap asa teang snehea

lines.line: បាត់បង់អស់គ្រប់យ៉ាងសល់តែគ្រួសារ
lines.phonetic: batbng asa krobyeang sal te kruosaear

lines.line: មិនហ៊ានលើកដៃបន់ទេវតា
lines.translation: Do not dare to raise your hand to swear to the angels
lines.phonetic: min han leukdai bn tevta

lines.line: បណ្ដោយតាមកម្មតែមិនបណ្ដែតតាមវាសនា
lines.translation: Indulge in karma but do not float in destiny
lines.phonetic: bandaoy tam kamm te min bandet tam veasanea

lines.line: គ្មានអ្នកណាសរសើរអ្នកឯងទេ
lines.phonetic: kmean anaknea sarsaer anak eng te

lines.line: អ្នកឯងបោះមេគេចាំតែសើចទេ
lines.translation: You throw the boss, they just want to laugh
lines.phonetic: anak eng baoh me ke chate saech te

lines.line: You will never be ok
lines.phonetic: you will never be ok

lines.line: បើមិនគិតពីខ្លួនឯងគិតតែផ្ដោតនៅលើគេ
lines.translation: If you do not think of yourself, just focus on them
lines.phonetic: bae min kit pi khluoneng kitte phdaot now leu ke

lines.line: ធុញថប់នឹងជីវិតចង់បញ្ចប់
lines.translation: Bored of life wanting to end
lines.phonetic: thounhothb nung chivit chng banhchob

lines.line: ឆ្លុះមើលកញ្ចក់ឃើញខ្លួនឯងគួរអោយស្អប់
lines.translation: Looking in the mirror, seeing yourself as disgusting
lines.phonetic: chhloh meul kanhchok kheunh khluoneng kuor aoy saab

lines.line: បិសាចនៅក្នុងខួរលងរាល់ថ្ងៃឡើងចង់ឡប់
lines.translation: The monster in the brain haunts every day and wants to return
lines.phonetic: besach nowknong khuor lng realthngai laeng chng lb

lines.line: មានតែរាងកាយបាត់វិញ្ញាណដូចសាកសព
lines.translation: Only the body loses its spirit like a corpse
lines.phonetic: meante reangkay batvinhnhean dauch sakasap

lines.line: អ្នកណាគេទៅខ្វល់ពីមនុស្សកាកសំណល់
lines.phonetic: anaknea ke tow khval pi mnoussa kaksaamnl

lines.phonetic: dot kamtech chaol kar changcham min bansaol

lines.phonetic: chenhtow aoy chhngay kanleng kmean anak towdl

lines.phonetic: lok teangpir kante chasa

lines.line: អាណិតពុកម៉ែកុំធ្វើឲ្យលោកអាម៉ាស់
lines.translation: Pity parents, do not embarrass him
lines.phonetic: anet pouk me kom thveuaoy lok ameasa

lines.line: គុណមិនទាន់សងកម្មរឹតតែក្រាស់
lines.phonetic: koun mintean sang kamm rutte krasa

lines.line: ធ្វើឱ្យលោកសប្បាយដូចជួយព្រះពុទ្ធឲ្យបានត្រាស់
lines.translation: Make him happy like helping the Buddha to attain enlightenment
lines.phonetic: thveu aoy lok sabbay dauch chuoy preahpoutth aoy ban trasa

lines.phonetic: batcheung krahm anak mdeay chea anakmeul

lines.phonetic: chng slab teang kmeng min brasaer

lines.phonetic: samrok tukaphnek prohte babmitt
